title: Yum! Brands India is Hiring: Guest Relations Manager (Lead)

jsonLd.title: Yum! Brands India is Hiring: Guest Relations Manager (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
Yum! Brands India is actively seeking a talented and motivated Guest Relations Manager to join our dynamic team in Bhubaneswar. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Yum! Brands India:
Yum! Brands India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate housekeeping and maintenance for room readiness
• Manage procurement of hotel supplies and control operating costs
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out
• Deliver exceptional guest experiences in line with brand standards
• Plan and execute banquets, events, and MICE functions
• Assist in menu planning, costing, and food festival coordination
• Conduct regular guest satisfaction surveys and implement improvements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Tour Planning
• Proficiency in PMS Systems
• Proficiency in HACCP
• Proficiency in Opera PMS
• Proficiency in OTA Management
• Proficiency in Sommelier Skills
• Proficiency in GDS Systems
• Proficiency in Revenue Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Bhubaneswar, Odisha, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Yum! Brands India!
